channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Sleeping bag, ironing board other rubbish on pavement, 31st March
item.description:
Growing pile of rubbish. Encouraging other people to dump stuff in same place. In forecourt of two garages on Delaune St SE17

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): De Laune Street, Kennington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Van parked on pavement, 31st March
item.description:
Not sure why they have parked like this Plenty of room in road and street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sunray Avenue, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Substantial pothole, 31st March
item.description:
Pothole causing cars to swerve which may cause an accident and danger to public life. The pothole could cause car damage.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erith Road, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wooden furniture by bin by underpass, 31st March
item.description:
Wooden furniture by bin
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cambridge Road, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: Black full rubbish bag outside station west pavement by bin, 31st March
item.description:
Bag by rubbish bin
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmers End Road, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: Small wheeled shopping trolley, 31st March
item.description:
Shopping bag/ trolley on pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Witham Road, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: Dead fox on road, 31st March
item.description:
Dead fox on east dulwich road. on the roundabout.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Spurling Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot holes along abridge road very bad, 31st March
item.description:
Pot holes been like this for months
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish / paperwork etc spilled out along the pavements, 31st March
item.description:
There has been a spill of paperwork and litter which stretches a long way from the pavement by the roundabout on Avery Hill Road, along up towards the University of Greenwich main entrance.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Avery Hill Road, Avery Hill
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near fence and tree, 31st March
item.description:
What's wrong is yet again on 31st of March it carrys on nothing is being done no culprits are being caught. What are you going to carry on doing ?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Church Manorway, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog/animal waste on Ethel Street - bad smell, 31st March
item.description:
There has been some sort of dog/animal waste at the top of Ethel Street for some weeks. It is now producing a rancid smell. Needs pressure-washing or similar.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ethel Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Off, 31st March
item.description:
Nothing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Kent Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sunken Manhole Cover, 30th March
item.description:
Sunken Manhole Cover- trip hazard - on pedestrian crossing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 150, Acre Lane, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant littering from the above house, 30th March
item.description:
Up to the middle of the pathway to the right where i have pictured , constant trash bags and other littering being thrown

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Walk, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All along Oxford Road, 30th March
item.description:
There is an accumulation of rubbish (along with unsweep leaves) up and down Oxford Road. Westminster which is the direct other sidewalk is sweep regularly.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oxford Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of shattered glass on the pavement on Onega Gate by the Hudson Yard House lay-by, 30th March
item.description:
Per the location marker in this report, for weeks there has been shattered glass on the pavement of Onega Gate by the Hudson Yard House lay-by. The glass appears to have come from a car that has had its window smashed in and left on the roadside. Nothing has been done about this for weeks and it is a clear hazard to walk on every day. Please may you assist as soon as possible? Many thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Onega Gate, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hedges overhanging, 30th March
item.description:
The hedges outside the Joseph Samantha’s apartments are now massively over hanging onto the public footpath forcing pedestrians to walk towards the edge of the main road and the entrance of the apartments there is a road sign post also within the pavement, what with this and the overgrown hedges it is linking it near impossible for pedestrians to walk safely down this section of road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 115, Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on Tabard street, 30th March
item.description:
There are plastic bottles, coffee cups, cans.and food packaging on the road and pavement alongside Tabard street and it has been there for three days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 165, Great Dover Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on Tabard Street, 30th March
item.description:
There are plastic bottles, tissues, pizza boxes and bits of paper on the pavement and road along Beckett house on Tabard Street. It has been there for three days and needs to be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tabard Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shopping trolly dumped, 30th March
item.description:
Location: o/s 27 Exeter Road, DA16 3 Next to tree.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Exeter Road, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
